# matomo_tagmanager_variable_clickhtmlattribute (Resource)

Reads a custom value from the clicked HTML attribute.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "matomo" {}

resource "matomo_site" "example" {
  name = "Example ClickHtmlAttribute Site"
  urls = ["https://example-clickhtmlattribute.example.com"]
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_container" "example" {
  site_id = matomo_site.example.id
  context = "web"
  name    = "Example ClickHtmlAttribute Container"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_variable_clickhtmlattribute" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  name         = "example-clickhtmlattribute"
  html_attribute = "example-value"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_id` (String)
- `html_attribute` (String) The name of the attribute, such as title, value, alt, or any other HTML attribute.
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `default_value` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
